source_script_line: Storm rolls in; every device emits the same interference burst.
staging_intent: Three characters scattered at three depths across the street, each caught by a different glitching device -- same burst, three simultaneous reactions. Not a lineup: staggered depths and lateral spread.
rain_note: Plate draws pre-rain storm air (no falling streaks -- per the Cycle 18 calibration caveat), so no foreground rain layer is added; adding streaks the plate lacks would mismatch.

characters.asset_note: His story-canonical state this issue: he HEARS the interference others only see.
characters.action: frozen mid-street as every device buzzes at once
characters.eye_target: middle distance -- the sound, not a single device

grounding_boost.note: Art-directed boost (Cycle 28): small mid-ground figure on very dark asphalt -- default shadow is invisible on near-black ground and his dark outfit's reflection washes out; measured grounding diff was 2.87 (below the 3.0 gate). Boosted until the cue both measures and reads.

characters.action: backing off the glitching magenta lamp

ground_contact.surface: wet asphalt near the left lamp

characters.asset_note: Looking-up variant aimed at the cyan key lamp directly above his position.
characters.action: staring up at the buzzing cyan streetlamp
characters.body_orientation: facing the near lamp, head tilted up

ground_contact.surface: wet asphalt at the right curb

decompression_note: Was MZ-2026-09-02_P02_PANEL01 in the 24-panel edition; same locked beat, renumbered by the 16-page/96-panel format directive.
